default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Outreach and GrowthX to discuss content performance, LLM visibility, and strategic planning.](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows declining clicks but increasing impressions; likely due to broader SEO landscape changes and potential Google Search Console reporting issues](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [LLM visibility for Outreach is steadily growing, with citations up across major platforms](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [Team to focus on identifying content gaps where competitors (especially Gong) are outperforming Outreach in LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/31PjD6HLeQKR-VxB11gJ1Ebb_63Js2cs?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

action_items.description: Analyze which content types (blog, product pages, resources) show most volatility post-update. Compare Jan-now. Report findings.
Initiate A/B testing for SERP-optimized titles & meta descriptions on key performer pages. Define test parameters, select pages.
Clarify with Scrunch team how "number of responses" metric is determined. Report findings to team.
Export Gong-related prompts from Scrunch (last 12 weeks). Focus on competitor presence. Share report with team.
